message: Jake
Kristy
Oh,
long time no see. It's been a while, hasn't it?
Huh?
Um, yeah, I guess, was it?
Even if you say it’s been a while, we’ve met quite a bit more often than in the past.
Welcome, I'm glad you came.
See
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
Surroundings
Guy
Günter
Guy
's　matter
Günter's matter
To another place
Save
End the game
It's a room with a calm sophistication typical of an adult woman. If she coordinated everything herself, it shows remarkable talent.
The view outside the window isn’t great,
but if there weren't a neighboring building, you could see the Hudson River.
I can’t believe she could afford a room in this area of Manhattan with her income,
so that means it’s a gift from Guy.
That's amazing! Next time we meet, let me get her to invest in my office. As a friend, that’s the least I could ask.
It’s her room. It has an adult woman's refined and calm interior.
He has withered away to a shadow of himself. He wasn’t particularly strong-minded to begin with, and the incident with Guy must have hit him hard.
Still, it seems much better than it used to. All that's left is if that irresponsible person would just come back.
I’ve become a bit smarter than I was a few years ago, laughed a little less, and of course, aged just a little.
If only I hadn’t let her go back then.
But that’s just how it is. You can’t go back and redo life. Unfortunately.
Even though I’ve gotten a little better,
there’s no smile on my face. I have to find Guy quickly.
I’m fine now. Sorry for making you worry about so many things.
No, it’s impressive. I’m surprised you’re feeling so better.
Oh, that’s such a harsh way to say it. I also had my share of troubles, you know.
Yeah, but I’m glad you’re feeling better, especially after hearing some weird story from Günter.
I’m glad; you look good and seem lively.
What’s with that? Are you saying it’s my fault or something?
No, I just had something on my mind and wanted to check.
Like I’ve stopped worrying about Guy now, I wonder?
I apologize for causing you concern until now.
No, no, it’s perfectly fine.
Hehe.
It must have been pretty rough at some points; I don’t remember it all that well.
Those are the things you should forget quickly.
Thank you, having good friends is really what you need.
Good friends, huh?
It’s funny how we were lovers just a few years ago.
It’s a nice day today, feels good.
Have you been in touch with Guy since then?
Oh no, I haven’t heard from Guy at all. But you know, that’s how he usually is.
You seemed pretty concerned about it until recently, but today you seem well.
Saying I’m well?
Are you saying there was a time when I wasn’t well?
Huh!? You’re not seriously saying you don’t remember anything, are you?
I'm sorry. I was definitely feeling down after the fight with Guy when that magazine BAM published gossip about him.
But now that I think about it, I wonder why I was so troubled. I feel like I'm surprisingly relieved, almost to the point of thinking it's strange.
I still like Guy just as much. It's just that I thought it was silly to waste time only thinking about him.
Do you remember Günter?
Strange question, right? I wouldn't forget the name of my counseling teacher.
Y-yeah, that's right.
Phew, that’s a relief.
You're a strange person.
Günter has this vibe like a dad. He feels like the ideal father you can talk to about anything.
Oh, so he’s a good listener, huh?
Hey, that's a bit sharp. Is there something you don’t like?
No, not really.
There's no way I can talk about what we discussed this morning.
What happened?
You seem kind of off?
Did something happen with Günter?
No, it's nothing serious. It's just his imagination.
Oh come on, it's about me, right? I hate being the only one in the dark.
If you hear it, you'll definitely be in a bad mood. So it’s better if you don’t know.
Why not? It’s about me, right?
Actually, I came to check because Günter asked about you.
But it’s totally wrong of him to think that.
I really don't like that. With such vague words, I can't help but be concerned.
It’s fine. I think you should trust what I say sometimes.
But...
Fine, I’ll just directly ask when I go to counseling next time.
When was my next counseling appointment again?
I'm not forgetting that I'm receiving counseling, and this time, it really seems like I'm okay.
It's quite different from what I heard from Günter.
I’ve already recovered, and I'm not in a precarious state.
Poor Gai, he's finally
an unimportant person.
That's quite a downgrade.
In this case,
there shouldn't be a problem if Gai is gone for a while. That's one less thing to worry about.
I seem to be doing well. It feels like I'm returning to normal.
There’s absolutely nothing strange about our conversation. This
what part of her is capable of committing murder?
I was worried when they said that Günter's
heart was troubled, but it seems like I'm completely fine now.
There shouldn't be any more worries.
All that's left is for Gai to come back.
Günter's story from this morning must have been a misjudgment on his part. Otherwise, this situation doesn’t make sense.
After all, psychiatrists just want to make money for their time. It's a terrible business to rip off patients who aren't even problematic!
This really is a big misjudgment on Günter's part. I wonder what he would say if he saw this situation.
Calling people over early in the morning, what an annoying old man.
